title: 4 Litre Tutti Frutti Insulated Thermal Lunch Bag | Portable Cooler for Office School | Thermal Lined Tote With Cool Box
features: THERMAL LUNCH BAG | Is it lunchtime yet?! This bag makes the perfect lunch tote! It is lined with thermal insulation to ensure that your hot things stay hot and cold things stay cold! The fruit design on the exterior of the thermal bag is eye-catching and adds a touch of fun to your lunch break
INSULATED LUNCH BAG | Our lunch bags come in three assorted colours - one will be selected and sent at random. (Please contact our customer service team if you have a preferred colour choice)
COOLER BAG | Great size with a wipe-clean, waterproof backing. Compact, lightweight, and easy to store when folded
LUNCH TOTE | The 4 litre capacity gives you plenty of room for taking healthy snacks out and about
LUNCH COOL BAG | A great size cool bag with wipe-clean, thermal insulation, to keep everything cool, and fresh for hours. Capacity 4 Litres
